title: CPU-Memory Interaction: Fetching a Word
description: A flowchart depicting the step-by-step process of how the CPU fetches a word (instruction or data) from the main memory (RAM), highlighting the roles of the MAR, MDR, and control unit.
relationships: PC provides address to MAR via internal bus
Memory places data on data bus
MDR latches data from data bus
Control Unit generates read signal and coordinates all steps
